name: figlets
description: Figlets MCP toolkit for designer-driven Figma design-system workflows. Registers the Figlets MCP server and adds a curated designer entrypoint for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Designer workflows for Figma design systems
interface.longDescription: Figlets lets designers talk naturally to Codex while deterministic MCP tools handle design-system setup, QA, token math, contrast checks, semantic gap detection, component documentation, DESIGN.md export, and approved Figma fixes.
defaultPrompt: Help me with my Figma design system
